articles.title: The Simple living in Kurma Gramam village

topStories.description: The United States fertility rate has now been in decline for two decades, dropping nearly 23 percent since 2007.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Kahlil Gibran: ‘Trust in dreams, for in them is….’
dailyNews.description: Kahlil Gibran, a prominent Lebanese-American writer, emphasised the importance of dreams in personal growth and spiritual fulfillment. His quote encourages faith in aspirations as gateways to deeper understanding and purpose, reflecting his belief in the transformative power of inner visions.

dailyNews.description: Rutte signals a possible coalition to secure the Strait of Hormuz after meeting Trump, but the White House says NATO was tested and already failed.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Says She Was Not a Victim of Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: Responding to what she said were smears, the first lady said she never had knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse. She called on Congress to continue investigating.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Purged Immigration Judges to Speed Up Deportations
dailyNews.description: Judges are ordering an unprecedented number of people deported after coming under significant pressure from the administration to do so or risk losing their jobs.

dailyNews.title: In a Deep Red Town In Pennsylvania, Locals Vent Over a Planned ICE Detention Center
dailyNews.description: The Tremont, Pa., area has roughly 2,000 residents and limited resources. The Trump administration plans to convert a warehouse there to hold nearly four times as many people.

dailyNews.title: Trump Officials Push Allies to Pursue Antifa and Far Left as Terrorist Threats
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration aims to deploy counterterrorism tools against far-left groups, even as it has offered little evidence they present a dire threat.

dailyNews.title: 5 Takeaways From the U.S. Push Against the Far Left
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has made countering antifa and other far-left groups a counterterrorism priority, despite increasing threats from the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: On Social Media, Democratic Politicians Are Letting the F-Word Fly
dailyNews.description: Democratic politicians are swearing with glee. It is usually aimed at President Trump.

dailyNews.title: ‘This War Isn’t Over’: 3 Opinion Writers Debate What Has to Happen Next in Iran
dailyNews.description: Will the shooting really stop? What should be Trump’s red lines? A discussion on where America’s war on Iran stands.

dailyNews.title: U.S. will host diplomatic talks between Israel and Lebanon, sources say
dailyNews.description: As President Trump issues a new warning to Iran to comply with a tenuous two-week ceasefire, the two sides don't even seem to agree on the terms of the deal.
